requirement_topic.en: NEHC Grid Connection for BESS — 220/380 V 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: NEHC BESS并网——220/380 V 50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: NEHC BESS併網——220/380 V 50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: Kyrgyzstan's electricity sector is regulated by the Ministry of Energy and overseen operationally by the National Energy Holding Company (NEHC) and its distribution subsidiaries (Severelectro, Vostokelektro, Oshelectro, Jalalabadelektro). All grid-connected BESS installations require technical review and grid-connection approval from the relevant grid operator. Kyrgyzstan's grid operates at 220/380 V 50 Hz (single-phase 220 V, three-phase 380 V) — the same nominal parameters as China — which reduces PCS voltage reconfiguration risk compared with markets using different voltage standards. However, Kyrgyzstan's grid is characterised by significant seasonal variation: hydro-dominant generation creates summer surplus and pronounced winter energy deficits, and grid stability and frequency quality in rural and mountainous areas may differ from urban centres. BESS project specifications in Kyrgyzstan typically reference IEC 62933 series standards (IEC 62933-2-1 unit parameters; IEC 62933-5-2 safety requirements) where international financing or EPC contractors are involved. A publicly accessible NEHC or Ministry of Energy technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection had not been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific connection agreement terms must be obtained directly from the relevant grid operator. Cold-climate and high-altitude design factors (see besskg-safety) affect PCS operating range and must be addressed in equipment specifications.
summary.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦电力部门由能源部监管，运营管理由国家能源控股公司（NEHC）及其配电子公司（Severelectro、Vostokelektro、Oshelectro、Jalalabadelektro）负责。所有并网BESS装置均须取得相关电网运营商的技术审查和并网批准。吉尔吉斯斯坦电网运行参数为220/380 V 50 Hz（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与中国标称参数相同——这相比电压标准不同的市场降低了储能变流器电压重新配置的风险。然而，吉尔吉斯斯坦电网存在显著的季节性变化：以水电为主的发电结构导致夏季电力过剩、冬季能源严重短缺，农村和山区的电网稳定性和频率质量可能不及城市中心。在有国际融资或EPC承包商参与的项目中，吉尔吉斯斯坦BESS项目规格通常引用IEC 62933系列标准（IEC 62933-2-1单元参数；IEC 62933-5-2安全要求）。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认NEHC或能源部公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属并网协议条款须直接向相关电网运营商获取。寒冷气候和高海拔设计因素（见besskg-safety）影响储能变流器运行范围，须在设备规格中加以说明。
summary.zht: 吉爾吉斯斯坦電力部門由能源部監管，運營管理由國家能源控股公司（NEHC）及其配電子公司（Severelectro、Vostokelektro、Oshelectro、Jalalabadelektro）負責。所有併網BESS裝置均須取得相關電網運營商的技術審查和併網批准。吉爾吉斯斯坦電網運行參數為220/380 V 50 Hz（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與中國標稱參數相同——這相比電壓標準不同的市場降低了儲能變流器電壓重新配置的風險。然而，吉爾吉斯斯坦電網存在顯著的季節性變化：以水電為主的發電結構導致夏季電力過剩、冬季能源嚴重短缺，農村和山區的電網穩定性和頻率質量可能不及城市中心。在有國際融資或EPC承包商參與的項目中，吉爾吉斯斯坦BESS項目規格通常引用IEC 62933系列標準（IEC 62933-2-1單元參數；IEC 62933-5-2安全要求）。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認NEHC或能源部公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬併網協議條款須直接向相關電網運營商獲取。寒冷氣候和高海拔設計因素（見besskg-safety）影響儲能變流器運行範圍，須在設備規格中加以說明。

standards_or_laws: Kyrgyzstan Ministry of Energy — regulatory authority for electricity sector; grid-connection approvals required

National Energy Holding Company (NEHC) and distribution subsidiaries (Severelectro, Vostokelektro, Oshelectro, Jalalabadelektro) — grid operators; project-specific connection agreements define technical requirements

IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference for internationally financed projects)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Kyrgyzstan grid parameters: 220/380 V 50 Hz (single-phase 220 V, three-phase 380 V) — same as China nominal

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V — the same nominal voltage as Kyrgyzstan — which means PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings designed for China do not require fundamental re-parameterisation for Kyrgyzstan's grid voltage. However, project-specific grid-quality parameters (frequency stability, harmonic limits, fault-ride-through requirements) must be confirmed with NEHC for each project.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V——与吉尔吉斯斯坦标称电压相同——因此针对中国设计的储能变流器电压保护阈值和穿越参数无需为吉尔吉斯斯坦电网电压进行根本性重新配置。然而，项目专属电网质量参数（频率稳定性、谐波限值、故障穿越要求）须针对每个项目向NEHC确认。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V——與吉爾吉斯斯坦標稱電壓相同——因此針對中國設計的儲能變流器電壓保護閾值和穿越參數無需為吉爾吉斯斯坦電網電壓進行根本性重新配置。然而，項目專屬電網質量參數（頻率穩定性、諧波限值、故障穿越要求）須針對每個項目向NEHC確認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy NEHC's grid-connection requirements. Key considerations: (a) grid voltage parity — Kyrgyzstan and China share the same 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal parameters, so fundamental PCS voltage reconfiguration is not required; however, actual grid-quality conditions (frequency deviation, harmonics, fault levels) in Kyrgyzstan's hydro-dominated and mountainous grid may differ from Chinese grid assumptions embedded in PCS protection firmware — verify with NEHC; (b) NEHC project-specific connection agreement — engage the relevant distribution operator (Severelectro for Bishkek and northern areas, etc.) at the earliest project stage; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — where project specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence (expected for internationally financed projects), prepare test and design documentation accordingly; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) EAEU TR CU 004/2011 EAC certification — BESS PCS inverters as low-voltage electrical equipment may be in scope for TR CU 004/2011 mandatory EAC certification before sale in Kyrgyzstan as an EAEU member; verify scope with an EAEU-accredited certification body; (e) cold-climate and high-altitude derating — PCS must be rated for Kyrgyzstan's operating temperature range and, for high-altitude sites, derated or specifically rated for altitude-related effects on cooling and component performance.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足NEHC并网要求。主要注意事项：（a）电网电压一致性——吉尔吉斯斯坦与中国共享相同的220/380 V 50 Hz标称参数，因此不需要对储能变流器进行根本性电压重新配置；但吉尔吉斯斯坦以水电为主的山地电网实际电网质量条件（频率偏差、谐波、故障电平）可能与储能变流器保护固件所嵌入的中国电网假设不同——须向NEHC核实；（b）NEHC项目专属并网协议——在项目最早阶段与相关配电运营商（北部地区及比什凯克为Severelectro等）接触；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——若项目规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据（国际融资项目通常如此），须相应准备测试和设计文件；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）EAEU TR CU 004/2011 EAC认证——BESS储能变流器逆变器作为低压电气设备，在吉尔吉斯斯坦（EAEU成员）销售前可能须取得TR CU 004/2011强制EAC认证；须向EAEU认可认证机构核实适用范围；（e）寒冷气候和高海拔降额——储能变流器须按吉尔吉斯斯坦运行温度范围额定，对于高海拔场址，须针对海拔对冷却及组件性能的影响进行降额或专项额定。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足NEHC併網要求。主要注意事項：（a）電網電壓一致性——吉爾吉斯斯坦與中國共享相同的220/380 V 50 Hz標稱參數，因此不需要對儲能變流器進行根本性電壓重新配置；但吉爾吉斯斯坦以水電為主的山地電網實際電網質量條件（頻率偏差、諧波、故障電平）可能與儲能變流器保護韌體所嵌入的中國電網假設不同——須向NEHC核實；（b）NEHC項目專屬併網協議——在項目最早階段與相關配電運營商（北部地區及比什凱克為Severelectro等）接觸；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——若項目規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據（國際融資項目通常如此），須相應準備測試和設計文件；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）EAEU TR CU 004/2011 EAC認證——BESS儲能變流器逆變器作為低壓電氣設備，在吉爾吉斯斯坦（EAEU成員）銷售前可能須取得TR CU 004/2011強制EAC認證；須向EAEU認可認證機構核實適用範圍；（e）寒冷氣候和高海拔降額——儲能變流器須按吉爾吉斯斯坦運行溫度範圍額定，對於高海拔場址，須針對海拔對冷卻及組件性能的影響進行降額或專項額定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NEHC / Ministry of Energy grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS in Kyrgyzstan; EAEU TR CU 004/2011 EAC certification is mandatory for in-scope low-voltage electrical equipment sold in Kyrgyzstan as an EAEU member state; project-specific technical requirements must be obtained from the relevant grid operator
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558-2023 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Kyrgyzstan

source.publisher: Ministry of Energy of the Kyrgyz Republic

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Kyrgyzstan's NEHC grid-connection requirements. While Kyrgyzstan and China share the same 220/380 V 50 Hz nominal grid parameters (reducing PCS voltage reconfiguration risk), project-specific grid-quality conditions and NEHC technical requirements must be verified directly. BESS PCS inverters may additionally require EAEU TR CU 004/2011 EAC certification as mandatory for in-scope low-voltage equipment sold in Kyrgyzstan. Engage NEHC and the relevant distribution operator at the earliest project stage to determine connection agreement technical requirements and applicable IEC 62933 evidence. Account for cold-climate and high-altitude derating requirements in equipment specifications.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足吉尔吉斯斯坦NEHC并网要求。尽管吉尔吉斯斯坦与中国共享相同的220/380 V 50 Hz标称电网参数（降低了储能变流器电压重新配置风险），但须直接核实项目专属电网质量条件和NEHC技术要求。BESS储能变流器逆变器在吉尔吉斯斯坦销售时，可能额外须取得TR CU 004/2011 EAC认证作为范围内低压设备的强制要求。应在项目最早阶段与NEHC及相关配电运营商接触，确定并网协议技术要求和适用IEC 62933证据。设备规格中须考虑寒冷气候和高海拔降额要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足吉爾吉斯斯坦NEHC併網要求。儘管吉爾吉斯斯坦與中國共享相同的220/380 V 50 Hz標稱電網參數（降低了儲能變流器電壓重新配置風險），但須直接核實項目專屬電網質量條件和NEHC技術要求。BESS儲能變流器逆變器在吉爾吉斯斯坦銷售時，可能額外須取得TR CU 004/2011 EAC認證作為範圍內低壓設備的強制要求。應在項目最早階段與NEHC及相關配電運營商接觸，確定併網協議技術要求和適用IEC 62933證據。設備規格中須考慮寒冷氣候和高海拔降額要求。
